scripts.build: bun run build:base && cp extension/manifest.chrome.json extension/manifest.json
scripts.build:firefox: bun run build:base && cp extension/manifest.firefox.json extension/manifest.json
scripts.build:ext: bun run build && cd extension && zip -r ../dist/extension-chrome.zip . --exclude '*.chrome.json' --exclude '*.firefox.json'
scripts.build:ext:firefox: bun run build:firefox && cd extension && zip -r ../dist/extension-firefox.zip . --exclude '*.chrome.json' --exclude '*.firefox.json'
scripts.build:safari: bun run build:base && cp extension/manifest.safari.json extension/manifest.json
scripts.build:ext:safari: bun run build:safari && xcrun safari-web-extension-converter extension/ --project-location ./safari-extension --app-name "Teams But Actually Good" --bundle-identifier com.leonimust.teams-but-actually-good --no-open
scripts.build:base: bun run generate && bun esbuild src/injection.ts --bundle --loader:.css=text --loader:.svg=dataurl --outfile=dist/injection.js && cp dist/injection.js extension/injection.js
scripts.dev: bun run build && bun run tauri:dev
